falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 index closes above 5000 (a key resistance level not breached in the past 12 months) on 3 consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate a confirmed bullish breakout contradicting the 'HOLD' signal and suggesting a trend reversal rather than consolidation

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score metric exceeds 50 (current score: 37) within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score above 50 would indicate extreme market pressure and imminent reversal, directly contradicting the current 'HOLD' verdict

falsification_conditions.condition: The Federal Reserve announces a 50-basis-point rate cut in its next policy statement (currently indicating 25bps or less in market forecasts)
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This policy shift would create observable market volatility and trend confirmation, invalidating the 'UNKNOWN' phase designation

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
